name: cover-subtitle
text: A marketplace website that helps commercial spaces find artists, compare fit, and send clear custom-art project requests.
textPreview: A marketplace website that helps commercial spaces find artists, compare fit, and send clear custom-art project requests.

name: title-2
text: The website turns art buying into a guided workflow.
textPreview: The website turns art buying into a guided workflow.

name: body-2
text: The portal is built for businesses that need custom artwork and artists who need a structured way to present their services and manage inquiries.
textPreview: The portal is built for businesses that need custom artwork and artists who need a structured way to present their services and manage in...

name: buyer-copy
text: Browse by fit, review price and services, then send a request with budget, timeline, style, and space details.
textPreview: Browse by fit, review price and services, then send a request with budget, timeline, style, and space details.

name: artist-copy
text: Maintain a profile, show portfolio images, publish services and starting price, and update request status.
textPreview: Maintain a profile, show portfolio images, publish services and starting price, and update request status.

name: title-3
text: Artist search is organized around real project constraints.
textPreview: Artist search is organized around real project constraints.

name: body-3
text: The directory gives buyers practical filters instead of asking them to browse an undifferentiated gallery.
textPreview: The directory gives buyers practical filters instead of asking them to browse an undifferentiated gallery.

name: filter-list
text:
Search term
Style
Location
Service type
Maximum budget
textPreview: Search term | Style | Location | Service type | Maximum budget

name: filter-meaning
text: These map directly to the artist profile fields, so every result can be judged on project fit.
textPreview: These map directly to the artist profile fields, so every result can be judged on project fit.

name: title-4
text: Profiles package style, proof, and commercial fit on one page.
textPreview: Profiles package style, proof, and commercial fit on one page.

name: body-4
text: A buyer can move from visual evidence to decision criteria without leaving the artist detail page.
textPreview: A buyer can move from visual evidence to decision criteria without leaving the artist detail page.

name: profile-list
text:
Portfolio images
Location and display name
Artist bio
Starting price
Services and styles
Project request entry point
textPreview: Portfolio images | Location and display name | Artist bio | Starting price | Services and styles | Project request entry point

name: title-5
text: The request form makes the first inquiry actionable.
textPreview: The request form makes the first inquiry actionable.

name: body-5
text: Instead of a vague contact message, businesses submit the details artists need to evaluate fit, timing, and pricing.
textPreview: Instead of a vague contact message, businesses submit the details artists need to evaluate fit, timing, and pricing.

name: row-body-01
text: Examples include restaurant wall, lobby, office suite, or feature installation.
textPreview: Examples include restaurant wall, lobby, office suite, or feature installation.

name: row-body-02
text: Artists can understand scope and availability before responding.
textPreview: Artists can understand scope and availability before responding.

name: row-body-03
text: The form captures aesthetic preference, goals, constraints, and installation context.
textPreview: The form captures aesthetic preference, goals, constraints, and installation context.

name: title-6
text: Role-based dashboards keep each side focused after submission.
textPreview: Role-based dashboards keep each side focused after submission.

name: body-6
text: Businesses track sent requests. Artists manage their public profile and update incoming request status.
textPreview: Businesses track sent requests. Artists manage their public profile and update incoming request status.

name: business-body
text: Edit business name, industry, and location. Review requests already sent to artists with budget, timeline, style, description, and status.
textPreview: Edit business name, industry, and location. Review requests already sent to artists with budget, timeline, style, description, and status.

name: artist-body
text: Update display profile, bio, styles, services, price, and portfolio. Move requests through pending, accepted, declined, and completed.
textPreview: Update display profile, bio, styles, services, price, and portfolio. Move requests through pending, accepted, declined, and completed.

name: title-7
text: The technical foundation supports demos and production-style use.
textPreview: The technical foundation supports demos and production-style use.

name: body-7
text: The app separates local demonstration from database-backed operation, while keeping forms validated and routes role-aware.
textPreview: The app separates local demonstration from database-backed operation, while keeping forms validated and routes role-aware.

name: tech-body-0
text: Signup and login support artist and business roles with protected dashboards.
textPreview: Signup and login support artist and business roles with protected dashboards.

name: tech-body-1
text: Zod and React Hook Form enforce required profile and request fields.
textPreview: Zod and React Hook Form enforce required profile and request fields.

name: tech-body-2
text: In-memory test data supports demos; MongoDB and Mongoose support persistent storage.
textPreview: In-memory test data supports demos; MongoDB and Mongoose support persistent storage.

name: tech-body-3
text: Artist portfolios can use Cloudinary-backed uploads when credentials are configured.
textPreview: Artist portfolios can use Cloudinary-backed uploads when credentials are configured.

name: close-title
text: Stroque is a complete early-stage commissioning portal.
textPreview: Stroque is a complete early-stage commissioning portal.

name: close-body
text: The website covers the core path from discovery to project request management: searchable artists, rich profiles, structured intake, role-based dashboards, status tracking, validation, demo data, database models, and upload-ready portfolio support.
textPreview: The website covers the core path from discovery to project request management: searchable artists, rich profiles, structured intake, role...

name: close-note
text: Best next exposition focus: live demo the buyer path first, then show the artist dashboard.
textPreview: Best next exposition focus: live demo the buyer path first, then show the artist dashboard.
